name: Settlement assurance + hold underwriting (acceptance with priced holds)
comment: First evidence-backed scorecard: demand-side scores cite Workstream A W28 records. Source: their Handoffs to Workstream B #1/#2 (weekly-updates/2026-W28.md).

pain_severity.basis: EV-2026-W28-004 (540-day hold, DFSA escalation), EV-2026-W28-005, EV-2026-W28-003

pain_frequency.basis: 8 of 12 W28 records are hold/freeze/settlement pain across 7+ providers

workaround_cost.basis: EV-2026-W28-002/EV-2026-W28-008 support loops; EV-2026-W28-010 personal-account workarounds; multi-PSP redundancy costs integration + reconciliation

switching_intent.basis: EV-2026-W28-011 explicit switch; EV-2026-W28-009 public escalations; hold events are inflection points by nature

willingness_to_pay.basis: mamo.md: merchants pay +0.5-0.75% for same-day settlement — priced, observed WTP for settlement speed

payment_volume.basis: Acceptance volume bands unknown; needs segment sizing

credit_need.basis: EV-2026-W28-008 receivables gap; mamo.md paid-settlement uptake is a working-capital-demand proxy

botim_distribution_advantage.basis: BOTIM reach among online PSP merchants unknown; affected merchants are publicly identifiable, lowering CAC either way

transaction_data_advantage.basis: As acquirer BOTIM sees full acceptance flow + chargebacks by construction — but adoption assumed

payment_revenue_potential.basis: Acquiring margin real but competitive; net take after interchange paid away unknown

lending_revenue_potential.basis: Hold advances are short-duration, episodic balances

credit_risk_visibility.basis: Acquirer sees chargeback rates directly — the exact risk being underwritten; assumed pending build

competitive_defensibility.basis: Requires lender+acquirer combination PSPs lack (their handoff #1 thesis); Wio payments launch (IP-2026-001) bounds the window

ease_of_validation.basis: Hold-affected merchants publicly identifiable on review platforms; interviews + waitlist feasible in weeks

mvp_feasibility_7wk.basis: Full acquiring stack (scheme membership, BIN sponsor) exceeds 7 weeks; only a concierge advance-against-existing-PSP-receivables variant fits
